objective: [Momentum] sur Bitcoin dans le marché de crypto en 1 heure. Utiliser EMA + OBV et BOLLINGER + STOCHASTIC avec un SL/TP adaptés a la volatilite, filtre horaire de liquidité pour une adaptation de regime (trend vs range), gating par volatilite implicite/realisee; mode_microstructure ajoutant un filtre de session/horaire et liquidite. RSI<30/RSI>70 sans filtre additionnel, hypothese testable et falsifiable. SL/TP 10%, TP > 2%.

iterations.hypothesis: Using momentum indicators Bollinger Bands (BB) and On-Balance Volume (OBV), along with ATR based risk management and trend filter, can provide a robust trading strategy in the crypto market within 1 hour.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy is based on momentum indicators, Bollinger Bands and On-Balance Volume. However, it lacks diversification, as all the strategies used are trend following ones. Moreover, the use of 30 minute historical data for building filters might not be sufficient considering cryptocurrency markets' high volatility and low liquidity. Furthermore, since we are trading with a relatively large position size (10% risk), small changes in price could lead to significant losses or gains. The strategy also assumes that market conditions will remain consistent throughout the 1-hour time horizon which may not always hold true.
[Backup plan] For potential weaknesses, I would suggest adding diversification by including other strategies and possibly using a mean-reversion approach. For poor results (negative return), I could consider applying risk management rules such as stop loss and take profit levels to limit drawdowns. For mediocre returns (low Sharpe ratio), I could investigate which specific indicators or parameters perform the worst and adjust them accordingly, for example by tuning Bollinger Bands upper and lower bounds. In case of failure, a more comprehensive approach involving other strategies like mean reversion might be considered.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger bands, Donchian channel, RSI and ATR with trending filter to enter long positions in Bitcoin during 1 hour trading sessions.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy has been backtested for 1 hour trading sessions using Bollinger Bands, Donchian Channels, RSI and ATR with trending filter to enter long positions in Bitcoin. The Sharpe ratio is 0.640 with a trade-to-return of +189.82%. Potential weaknesses include the fact that this strategy only operates within one hour trading sessions which may not capture all market conditions, also high volatility can cause excessive drawdown. If results are poor (negative return), adjustments could be made to filter parameters or indicators used and if results are mediocre (low Sharpe) then optimization of other aspects such as SL/TP values would help improve it.
[Backup plan] If the current strategy fails, alternative approaches that can be tried include: 1. Implementing a mean reversion strategy using Bollinger Bands and ATR to capture short-term reversal opportunities in Bitcoin prices. 2. Utilizing machine learning models like SVM or Random Forest to predict future price movements based on historical data which might improve the accuracy of the system. 3. Combining multiple uncorrelated strategies together, such as combining momentum with mean reversion for better overall performance.

iterations.hypothesis: The momentum strategy in Bitcoin crypto market after 1 hour can be improved by using EMA, OBV and Bollinger bands along with a stop-loss/take profit filter based on volatility, Gating by volatilite realised or implied ( тренд vs флуктуация)
